title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin tested whether Claude Opus should plan and Kimi K2.6 implement, or vice versa, in an autonomous coding workflow. Using Archon, he ran the same GitHub issue resolution workflow four ways and scored 12 resulting PRs across seven dimensions including root cause analysis, code quality, and plan-to-implementation fidelity.
